problem id: ee61df9f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  10000000 -> 00000000
  01101110 -> 10011000
  11101100 -> 00110001
  01111111 -> 11011100
  00010111 -> 01000100
  00100010 -> 10001000
  01101111 -> 10011000
  00100110 -> 10001000
  10000110 -> 00000001
  01100010 -> 10001000

query: 10010011
predicted answer: 01000100
